item.title: First reading, referred to Local Government.
item.description: First reading, referred to Local Government.

item.title: 👍💵Candice Bock - Association of Washington Cities
item.description: Candice Bock signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Association of Washington Cities. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍Dylan Doty - Washington Fire Chiefs Association
item.description: Dylan Doty signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington Fire Chiefs Association.

item.title: 👍John Sheller - King County Library System
item.description: John Sheller signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent King County Library System.

item.title: 👎Patrick Quinton - City of Vancouver
item.description: Patrick Quinton signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent City of Vancouver.

item.title: 👍💵Travis Dutton - Washington State Association of Counties / Policy Coordinator
item.description: Travis Dutton signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington State Association of Counties / Policy Coordinator. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍Sean Eagan - The Port of Tacoma
item.description: Sean Eagan signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent The Port of Tacoma.

item.title: 👍💵Briahna Murray - Cities of Lynnwood, and Moses Lake
item.description: Briahna Murray signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Cities of Lynnwood, and Moses Lake. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍💵Matthew Ellsworth - Association of Washington Public Hospital Districts
item.description: Matthew Ellsworth signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Association of Washington Public Hospital Districts. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: ❓Eric ffitch - Washington Public Ports Association
item.description: Eric ffitch signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent Washington Public Ports Association.

item.title: 👍John Flanagan - Port of Seattle
item.description: John Flanagan signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Port of Seattle.

item.title: ❓Al French - Spokane County
item.description: Al French signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent Spokane County.
